overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban coastal area at sunset. The character crosses a city intersection, walks along a palm-lined sidewalk, and continues along a scenic coastal park path overlooking the ocean during golden hour.

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the marked crosswalk at the city intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection
person standing on the opposite sidewalk near the corner

entered.detail: large multi-level parking garage with open concrete levels and palm trees on top
modern turquoise-colored high-rise building with reflective windows
red and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a city intersection during golden hour, then crosses the street. A multi-story parking structure dominates the center view while a turquoise glass building stands to the right. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the character walks across the marked crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban sidewalk adjacent to coastal park

events.description: moving from street intersection to sidewalk along grassy park area
ocean view becomes visible over the park lawn to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a grassy park area with tall palm trees

notable_agents.action: dark sports car parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall dark-colored high-rise apartment building with many windows
low-rise white modern apartment complex with curved facade
well-maintained green lawn with scattered palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a grassy park on the left. Tall palm trees line the path while a dark residential tower rises in the distance. Parked cars sit along the curb to the right, and the ocean becomes visible over the park lawn as the sun sets.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal park path with ocean overlook

events.description: entering the elevated coastal path with white wooden fence overlooking the ocean
path curves gently to the right following the coastline

agents.ego_description: walking along the scenic coastal path enjoying the sunset ocean view

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera along the coastal path

entered.detail: white wooden safety fence with X-pattern rails along the cliff edge
ocean view with orange and purple sunset reflection on the water
large mature trees with dense dark canopy overhanging the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved coastal path bordered by a white wooden fence on the left overlooking the ocean. The sunset creates a warm orange glow on the horizon. Large trees provide partial shade over the path as the character passes another pedestrian and continues along the curving walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved coastal walkway returning toward urban area

events.description: path curves revealing tall apartment buildings on the right side
entering more shaded area under dense tree canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding coastal path as urban buildings come back into view on the right

entered.detail: tall white and glass residential building with multiple balconies
ornate black street lamp post with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The coastal path continues curving along the cliffside with the white fence now further to the left. Tall modern apartment buildings become prominent on the right as the path returns toward the urban area. The ocean remains visible in the distance while street lamps and park benches line the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling city intersection into a serene, sunset-lit coastal promenade. It begins with the character crossing a street amidst urban traffic, framed by a multi-story parking structure and a turquoise glass building. As the character moves onto a concrete sidewalk, the urban density gives way to a grassy park lined with tall palm trees, while the ocean gradually emerges on the horizon under a deepening golden sky. The scene then shifts to a paved coastal path bordered by a white wooden fence, where the warm orange glow of the sunset illuminates the walkway and the surrounding shade of large trees. Finally, the path curves along the cliffside, passing street lamps and park benches before turning back toward the city as tall modern apartment buildings rise on the right.
